description_long: This is a modern, rectangular bed with a solid wooden frame featuring clean, straight lines and a warm, polished wood finish. The bed has raised sides and a back panel, forming a shallow box-like enclosure around the sleeping area. The mattress is a single, flat, and thick cushion in a muted olive-brown color, fitting snugly within the frame. The front of the bed is open, allowing easy access, while the back and sides provide support and a sense of enclosure. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The bed's construction appears sturdy, with no visible legs or under-bed storage.
description: A minimalist, box-style wooden bed with a thick olive-brown mattress and raised sides and back. The open front allows easy access, and the design is clean and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access, full width of the mattress, and the raised wooden sides and back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wooden side panel and the thickness of the mattress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the enclosed nature of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the other solid wooden side and mattress thickness.
